title: Pan-Seared Fish with Roasted Vegetables
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the freshness of fish with the earthiness of roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: flaky fish
ingredients.notes: white fish such as cod or tilapia

ingredients.name: roasted vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, zucchini and bell peppers

instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the fish for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the fish to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Toss the sliced potatoes with olive oil, salt and pepper, and roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Add the roasted vegetables to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
Serve the fish with roasted potatoes and vegetables.
